title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-hosted LLM runner with a simple CLI and REST API that lets you pull, run, and chat with 70+ open models (Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, …) on macOS, Linux, and Windows.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, generate embeddings, and manage local models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers to talk to the Ollama REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama as a local LLM backend for chains, agents, and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-web/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich, self-hosted ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama with multi-model chats, code highlighting, RAG, and user auth.

title: ollama-cli (mattw/ollama-cli)
summary: Rust-based TUI that wraps Ollama with keyboard-driven chat history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot (sammcj/ollama-copilot)
summary: GitHub Copilot-style VS-Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline code suggestions.

title: ollama-rag (ggerganov/ollama-rag)
summary: Minimal reference implementation of retrieval-augmented generation using Ollama + Sentence-Transformers + FAISS.

title: ollama-helm (otw/ollama-helm)
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-docker (ollama/ollama-docker)
summary: Official container images (CPU & CUDA) and compose examples for running Ollama in Docker.

title: ollama-nvim (nomnivore/ollama-nvim)
summary: Neovim plugin to query Ollama models inside the editor for code explanation, generation, and refactoring.

title: ollama-haystack (deepset-ai/haystack-ollama)
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in production pipelines.

title: ollama-rust (pepperoni21/ollama-rust)
summary: Community Rust crate that provides an async client for the Ollama REST API with Serde models.

title: ollama-go (jmorganca/ollama-go)
summary: Official Go client library for Ollama with chat, generate, and embedding endpoints.

title: ollama-discord (daxcore/ollama-discord)
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands and thread support.
